add_stream_reorder_2d.note: Sum two token-major streams and reorder the result into merged-tile traversal.

attention_forward_causal_head_major_shar.note: Gemma4 assistant prefill q-only attention. q_scratch is used as Q/K/V.
Gemma4 assistant prefill q-only sliding attention. q_scratch is used as Q/K/V.

attention_forward_decode_head_major_shar.note: Gemma4 assistant decode q-only attention over shared-Q KV cache.
Gemma4 assistant sliding decode q-only attention over shared-Q KV cache.

attention_forward_causal_head_major_gqa_.note: Prefill: all tokens process together with causal mask Gemma4 variant uses attention score scale 1.0 to match llama.cpp.
Prefill: sliding window attention with causal mask Gemma4 variant uses attention score scale 1.0 to match llama.cpp.

attention_forward_decode_head_major_gqa_.note: Decode: single query token attends to KV cache (positions 0..pos) Gemma4 variant uses attention score scale 1.0 to match llama.cpp.
Decode: sliding window attention - single query token attends to last W KV cache entries Gemma4 variant uses attention score scale 1.0 to match llama.cpp.

attention_forward_full_head_major_gqa_ex.note: Prefill: exact full / bidirectional grouped-query attention across the entire sequence

attention_forward_full_head_major_gqa_fl.note: Prefill: full / bidirectional attention across the entire sequence Gemma4 variant uses attention score scale 1.0 to match llama.cpp.

attention_forward_full_head_major_gqa_gg.note: Prefill: GGML-compatible non-flash full / bidirectional grouped-query attention across the entire sequence

embedding_forward_bf16_fp32.note: BF16 token embedding lookup with FP32 output for v8 inference streams.

feature_concat.note: Concatenate a main output with fixed-width collected branch slices.

feature_slice_copy.note: Generic row-wise copy into a feature-axis slice of a wider destination tensor.

gelu_exact_inplace.note: Exact in-place GELU binding for parity-sensitive v8 paths.

gelu_ggml_inplace.note: GGML-compatible in-place GELU binding for llama.cpp parity-sensitive v8 paths.

gemm_naive_parallel.note: Exact FP32 NT GEMM binding for parity-sensitive matmuls.

gemm_nt_f16.note: FP16-weight dense GEMM wrapper with the standard matmul ABI.

gemm_nt_fp32_exact.note: Exact FP32 NT GEMM binding for parity-sensitive matmuls.

gemma4_final_logit_softcap_forward.note: Apply Gemma4 final logit softcapping in-place: tanh(logit / cap) * cap.

assistant_layer_scale_forward.note: Apply Gemma4 assistant/MTP per-layer scalar to the assistant hidden stream.

gemma4_per_layer_embed_forward.note: Apply Gemma4 per-layer residual branch using prepared per-layer input stream.

gemma4_per_layer_prepare_bf16_forward.note: Prepare Gemma4 per-layer input stream from BF16 safetensors embeddings.

gemma4_per_layer_prepare_forward.note: Prepare Gemma4 per-layer input stream from original embeddings.

gemv_bf16.note: BF16-weight dense GEMV wrapper with the standard matmul ABI.

im2patch.note: Allow rectangular vision inputs by binding explicit image_height/image_width.

kv_cache_store_f16.note: Store K,V into the packed FP16 decode KV cache.

layernorm_forward.note: Generic LayerNorm binding with explicit gamma and beta.

layernorm_forward_unrolled_slice.note: Generic LayerNorm binding with explicit gamma and beta.

layernorm_fp32_exact.note: Exact LayerNorm binding for parity-sensitive templates.

layernorm_naive_serial_matched_precision.note: Direct function-name alias for the exact LayerNorm binding.

mrope_qk_text.note: Text multi-section RoPE driven by runtime token position offset.

position_embeddings_add_tiled_2d_align_c.note: Add align-corners position embeddings to an activation stream already laid out in merged-tile order.

position_embeddings_add_tiled_2d.note: Add position embeddings to an activation stream already laid out in merged-tile order.

quantize_row_q8_0.note: Allow vision/footer quantize ops to request batched row emission when rows is present.

quantize_row_q8_k.note: Allow vision/footer quantize ops to request batched row emission when rows is present.

rmsnorm_forward.note: RMSNorm does not require an rstd cache in v8 runtimes.

rope_forward_qk_gemma4_direct.note: Gemma4 RoPE uses per-layer frequency base and optional full-attention frequency factors.

rowwise_bias_add.note: Explicit in-place rowwise bias binding for vision/header bring-up.

spatial_merge_contiguous_tiled.note: Merge contiguous groups of merge_size^2 tokens from a merged-tile-ordered stream.

split_qkv_packed_head_major_forward.note: Split packed token-major QKV rows into head-major Q/K/V buffers for transformer attention.

vision_position_ids_2d_merge.note: Materialize merged-tile vision position IDs for position-driven M-RoPE.

q_norm_forward.note: Gemma4 assistant q-only per-head RMSNorm. In-place on q_scratch.

kv_cache_store_shared_q.note: Gemma4 assistant decode cache store. Writes post-RoPE Q into both K and V cache.

rope_forward_q_split_direct_f32.note: Gemma4 assistant q-only split-half direct RoPE with per-layer theta/rotary_dim and optional frequency factors.

rope_forward_qk_split_direct_f32.note: Generic split-half direct RoPE with per-layer theta/rotary_dim and optional frequency factors.

spatial_average_pool_contiguous.note: Average-pool merge_size x merge_size spatial tiles while preserving embedding width.

position_embeddings_add_gemma4v_xy.note: Gemma4V learned 2D positional embeddings: add x-table[col] plus y-table[row] from [2, source_grid, dim].

rope_forward_qk_gemma4v_vision_xy.note: Gemma4V vision 2D NEOX RoPE: first half uses x patch position, second half uses y patch position.

gemm_nt_f16_clipped.note: Gemma4V clippable FP16 dense GEMM. The alt lists select the clamp scalars matching the projection weight present on this op.

rmsnorm_forward_kv_lora.note: Kimi MLA latent RMSNorm uses kv_lora_rank, not model hidden size.
